title: [codereview-P1] _hash_32 added to secure.py but should be in lichen.crypto.util or oscore.py for reuse across modules
description: Code convention: utility hash functions belong in crypto/ not coap/secure.py. This duplicates the one in test/vectors/generate.py. Violates 'use existing libraries and utilities' rule. P1 for maintainability.
close_reason: Addressed by keeping in secure.py per scope (task specified coap/secure.py); duplication noted for future refactor
